pattern_name: X% Decline + Consequence
pattern_formula: Your [Body Function] Dropped [X]% After [Age] — Here's What It Does to [Consequence]
example: Your Stomach Acid Dropped 40% After 60 — Here's What It Does to Your Meds

pattern_name: Normal But Suffering + Cells
pattern_formula: Your [Lab Value] Looks Normal After [Age] — But Your [Body Part] Are [Suffering Verb]
example: Your Iron Levels Look Normal After 60 — But Your Cells Are Starving

pattern_name: The Lab Test Mask + Organ dysfunction
pattern_formula: The [Lab Test] Mask: Why Your [Test Name] [Fails Verb] After [Age] — [Hidden Mechanism]
example: The Ferritin Mask: Why Your Iron Test Lies After 60 — Inflammation Hides the Truth

pattern_name: Authority Predicts Disaster + Time Window
pattern_formula: [Authority] Predicts [Disaster] [Time Window] Before — After [Age]
example: Dentist Predicts Heart Attack 6 Months Before — After 60

pattern_name: Body Part Sending Organ Warnings
pattern_formula: Your [Body Part A] Are Sending [Organ B] Warnings After [Age] — [Number] Signs
example: Your Gums Are Sending Heart Warnings After 60 — 3 Signs

pattern_name: Why Authority Sees Organ First
pattern_formula: Why Your [Authority] Sees Your [Organ] First — After [Age]
example: Why Your Dentist Sees Your Heart First — After 60

pattern_name: Blood Test Sees Body Ageing
pattern_formula: This [Blood Test] Sees Your [Body Part] Ageing — After [Age]
example: This Blood Test Sees Your Arterial Ageing — After 60

pattern_name: Metric A vs Metric B After Age
pattern_formula: Your [Metric A] vs [Metric B] After [Age] — The [Diagnostic]
example: Your Arterial Age vs Real Age After 60 — The Blood Test

pattern_name: Normal But Ageing Paradox
pattern_formula: Why Your [Metric A] Is Normal But [Body Part] [Verb] After [Age]
example: Why Your Cholesterol Is Normal But Arteries Age After 60

pattern_name: Time Metric Pattern Predicts Disaster
pattern_formula: The [Time] [Metric] Pattern After [Age] That Predicts [Disaster]
example: The 4 AM Blood Pressure Pattern After 60 That Predicts Stroke

pattern_name: NOT Common Belief True Cause
pattern_formula: [Symptom] After 60 Is NOT [Common Belief] — It's [True Cause]
example: Full Ears After 60? It's NOT Wax — It's Your Arteries

pattern_name: Body Change + Hidden Organ Consequence
pattern_formula: Your [Body Part] Changed After 60 — Here's Why Your [Organ] [Consequence]
example: Your Gut Bacteria Changed After 60 — Here's Why Your Mood Crashed

pattern_name: NOT Common Belief + Organ Truth
pattern_formula: [Symptom] After 60? It's NOT [Common Belief] — It's Your [Organ]
example: Swollen Lymph Nodes After 60? It's NOT Infection — It's Your Heart
